title: leontodon nudicaulis subsp. taraxacoides
intro: Leontodon nudicaulis subsp. taraxacoides, also known as the hawkweed or autumn hawkbit, is a perennial plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Leontodon nudicaulis subsp. taraxacoides include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from digestive issues to skin problems.
